title: inula auriculata
intro: Inula auriculata, also known as the Golden Ear Daisy, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting the immune system. Inula auriculata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions.
